name: Shadownilla
description:
I. am.... BLIND!!!

It's based off of the profile, it is not a toxic ship🚢 💔

Some context: SM accepted PV's request and now lives with him to be on a better path- but while PV was cutting his hair he cut it a bit too short and made him blind (because of the eyes from his hair) (The beasts also visit sometimes)

It's all based off of these images, alikuarso on X
creator: Zuihou
